description:
Return a list of columns relevant to a Budget View for a Budget Detail Report.

Note: The ID field of each Budget Column will appear as keys in rows returned by the List Budget Details API.

aggregatable.description: Indicates whether or not a column's values can be aggregated

filterable.description: Indicates whether or not budget details can be filtered by a column's values

groupable.description: Indicates whether or not budget details can be grouped by a column's values

id.description: Field used to identify a column's value in a budget detail row

name.description: Name of a column used in the Budget Detail Report

position.description: Indicates order in which columns appear in the Budget Detail Report

type.description: Describes what type a column is
